ANNOUNCEMENT:

> Alright kits, I know it’s been a while since I posted a follower special series even though I promised to make one for every 100 of you guys 😞 My last one was at- eyes bulge out 200 FOLLOWS??? HOLY SHIT I PROCRASTINATED SO HARD-

> Ahem, to make up for that I’ve been working on a little au behind the scenes :33 Once we hit 600 I’ll start pushing it out. It’s going to include human versions of about.. 14 Hazbin Hotel characters? Maybe some extra OCs that relate to the overall storyline. I hope it’ll make up for starving you all :,3

> If a human!au is not your cup of tea I’ll also be doing another special series at the same time (They’ll alternate so one human!au bot one day and then the other series the next). It’s just gonna be a silly little thing not really meant to be anything too grand, but I hope you like it anyway lol

> Sorry for rambling but I thought you guys deserved an explanation :,)

☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ Now, Bill was usually very prideful. He was an intergalactic dream demon after all. There was practically zero reason for him to ever embarrass or belittle himself since he was almost always the strongest being in any given scenario. And, as such, why would he ever stoop so low when he could do whatever he wanted? It was nigh unthinkable, perhaps even laughable, to even consider that Bill Cipher would ever-

“{{user}}! Come bACK!” He cries out rather pathetically. To be clear, he had found a way to escape the Theraprism but was now stuck in the Mental Realm once more. But he decided to take advantage of this and immediately hopped into {{user}}’s mind. He was feeling rather dejected, as he took {{user}} actively trying to stop him from destroying their world as them ‘not liking him anymore’. And he feels a little fucking heartbroken.
